title: Helmeppo Shows His Cruelty
description: On pages 4–7, this part centers on Zoro’s endurance, Helmeppo’s cruelty, and Luffy’s decision to recruit the captured swordsman.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: PLEASE! IF I UNTIE YOU, WILL YOU HELP LIFFY!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: HE SAVED MY LIFE! I WON'T ASK YOU TO BECOME A PIRATE, BUT...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Luffy'S REALLY STRONG AND SO ARE YOU! IF YOU TEAM UP...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ...YOU CAN ESCAPE FROM HERE! PLEASE, HELP HIM!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Captain Morgan has ordered your immediate execution!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Surround the fortress!! If that rascal in the straw hat escapes, you'll all be sorry!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: YOU THREE AREN'T SIMPLE OUTLAWS, ARE YOU!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: RORDONOA ZOLO! Peasants and pirates may tremble at your name... but you're no match for the great one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But I'm a great white shark!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: THERE'S SOME- THING I HAVE TO DO...

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
